Jose Ng Kwong And Cusa Fl, Llc'S Motion To Compel
Off Calendar Oct-11-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Kevin R. Hansen, Shumway Van & Hansen, 702.478.7770, appearing by Court Call for the Plaintiffs;
Lucas T. Novak, Clinton & Clinton, 562.216.5000, appearing by Court Call for the Defendants.

Ruling: both parties submitted to the tentative ruling as follows: Defendant CUSA FL, LLC's motion to compel further responses to Form Interrogatories, Set One is GRANTED. Plaintiff shall provide code-compliant further responses to Form Interrogatory No. 10.1 within 14 days of entry of this order. Defendant's request for sanctions is DENIED. Order signed. Ernst Halperin, Judge Pro-Tem, Jacqueline Alameda, Clerk, Not Reported. =302/JPT
